title: One death, two new in-region hospitalizations and 221 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta July 30–August 5
summary: During the week of July 30–August 5, YKHC reports one death, two new in-region hospitalizations and 221 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta.
